items.title: ‘Kozhikode–Kannur stretch saw most train stone attacks in past three years’
items.summary: Measures are in place to improve surveillance coverage in vulnerable locations, says an RPF officer; involvement of miscreants arrested in drug cases is also being probed

items.title: Crushed at the Polls, Hungary’s Former Ruling Party Licks Its Wounds
items.summary: Viktor Orban, who helped found the Fidesz party, said he would leave his Parliament seat but hoped to remain as head of his party.
